character.name: rabbit_mascot_v1
character.notes: Single front-facing reference image. Goal is to preserve head shape, ears, face markings, costume colors, and overall mascot silhouette. Prefer front and 3/4 views over extreme profile/back views.

global_negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, bad anatomy, malformed face, extra limbs, extra fingers, duplicate character, multiple characters, text, watermark, logo, ugly, noisy, distorted ears, wrong costume colors

scenes.prompt: Front-facing portrait of the rabbit mascot character, centered composition, soft studio lighting, clean background, high character readability
Three-quarter portrait of the same rabbit mascot character, slight head turn, soft cinematic lighting, clean composition, same costume and face identity

The same rabbit mascot character sitting at a desk with a laptop, indoor ambient lighting, same face identity, same costume details
